ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author */,
  "author2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second author (if applicable) */,
  "author3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third author (if applicable) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "isbn13" TEXT /* 13-digit ISBN number of the book */,
  "isbn10" TEXT /* 10-digit ISBN number of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the book (width x height x depth) */,
  "sales_rank" INTEGER /* Sales rank of the book */,
  "ratings_count" INTEGER /* Count of ratings received */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Average rating value */,
  "paperback_price" REAL /* Price of the paperback edition */,
  "hardcover_price" REAL /* Price of the hardcover edition */,
  "nookbook_price" REAL /* Price of the Nook edition */,
  "audiobook_price" REAL /* Price of the audiobook edition */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series the book belongs to */,
  "series_number" INTEGER /* Number of the book in the series */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES book_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author1_id FOREIGN KEY ("author1_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author2_id FOREIGN KEY ("author2_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author3_id FOREIGN KEY ("author3_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the author's official website */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price at the time of the transaction */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sale (e.g., store name, city) */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the book */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to reorder stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the book format (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, Audiobook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales summary record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the book */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold for the book */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average sale price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Online, Retail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sales channel */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the sales channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sales channel */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_sales_channels" (
  "book_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-sales channel record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the book through that channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_channels_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_channels_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Author, Editor, Sales Staff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
